scored_papers.title: DESI and Dynamical Dark Energy from Extended Pre-geometric Gravity
scored_papers.abstract: We consider the simplest quadratic extension of MacDowell-Mansouri pre-geometric gravity preserving the topological pre-volume form symmetry. After symmetry breaking, it becomes (Lovelock)^2 gravity, dual to a Galileon-like Horndeski scalar-tensor theory. The gravitational Higgs mechanism forces the Gauss-Bonnet coupling to be inversely proportional to the bare cosmological constant.
scored_papers.reason: 🎯 MacDowell-Mansouri pre-geom 拡張で gravi-axion が DE スケール生成!Einstein-Cartan 系 + axion + DESI を一気に串刺し ✨🚀
scored_papers.summary: 📐 Lovelock² 双対の Horndeski を gravi-Higgs 機構で導出。GB 係数が Λ_bare 逆比、θ角が動的化し DE を実現 🌌

scored_papers.title: Uncertainty Principles and Maximum Entropic Force
scored_papers.abstract: We consider quantum gravity corrections to the maximum entropic force that arise from several gravitational uncertainty principles. These include GUP, EUP, GEUP, and LQGUP.
scored_papers.reason: 🌀 GUP/EUP/GEUP/LQGUP を entropic force に流し込み量子重力補正を一網打尽 ✨ 不確定性 × emergent gravity の交差点 💫
scored_papers.summary: 🧲 修正最大エントロピー力が GUP パラメタ依存、E-UP 系では MOND 様補正や Tsallis 熱力学との接続も検討 🔭

scored_papers.title: Neutrino-Antineutrino Conversion from Ultralight Vector Dark Matter
scored_papers.abstract: We show that Majorana neutrinos convert into antineutrinos in a background of ultralight vector dark matter coupled to lepton number, such as U(1)_{B-L} or U(1)_{L_i - L_j}.
scored_papers.reason: 🌌 U(1)_{B-L} 等の超軽量ベクトル DM 場で Majorana ν↔ν̄ 変換!DUNE/HK/JUNO の SN ν バーストで未踏領域 🎯⚡
scored_papers.summary: 🔭 ν 質量で抑制も宇宙論距離で増幅、超新星ν で g~10⁻²⁵ 領域に感度。レプトン数ゲージ DM の新プローブ ✨

scored_papers.title: The structure of multi-axion solutions to the strong CP problem
scored_papers.abstract: We investigate the general structure of multi-axion solutions to the strong CP problem and study the different qualitative mass-coupling patterns that arise.
scored_papers.reason: 🪐 多軸 axion 解で標準 QCD バンド外の m-g パターンが出現!実験プログラム再考の手掛かり ⚡✨
scored_papers.summary: 🎻 多 axion 時 m_a-g_aγγ 関係が変調、QCD バンド左右や帯振幅変化が一般的に発生。検出戦略への含意 💫

scored_papers.title: Gravitational Wave Memory in Beyond GR Theories
scored_papers.abstract: We present the first computation of memory from full inspiral-merger-ringdown waveforms in a theory beyond GR, focusing on scalar Gauss-Bonnet gravity.
scored_papers.reason: 🌊 sGB 重力で IMR フル波形のメモリ初計算、GR との mismatch がメモリ込みで激増 ⚡ beyond GR の新観測量 ✨
scored_papers.summary: 🔬 sGB で %レベルの GR からのズレ、主因はマージダイナミクス、スカラー誘起 tensor memory は強く抑制 🎯

scored_papers.title: Decaying spin-3/2 dark matter from baryon number violation
scored_papers.abstract: We explore non-supersymmetric spin-3/2 dark matter with baryon number violating interactions in an effective field theory description.
scored_papers.reason: 🦄 非 SUSY の spin-3/2 DM + baryon 数破れ portal、freeze-in が baryogenesis と絡む新しい角度 ✨⚡
scored_papers.summary: 🌟 UV/Boltzmann 抑制 freeze-in で relic 達成、freeze-out は除外。崩壊シグナル + baryogenesis 連動の現象論 💫

scored_papers.title: Probing the Inert Doublet Dark Matter with Stellar-Mass Black Hole Mini-Spikes
scored_papers.abstract: We investigate the IDM parameter space through an analysis of FermiLAT observations of dark matter mini-spikes surrounding stellar-mass black holes.
scored_papers.reason: 🕳️ 恒星質量 BH まわりの DM mini-spike で IDM パラメタ空間を Fermi-LAT 制限!Higgs portal 系 DM 探索の新角度 ⚡✨
scored_papers.summary: 🎯 BH 重力圧縮で DM 密度増大、γ線フラックスで IDM 質量・カップリングを制約。BH 系プローブとして補完的 🌌
